channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 31st March
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab 900x600x20mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
Long branch that has snapped and is now hanging low vertically and may possibly snap off and cause damage to passing traffic or cyclists especially with current high winds.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 31st March
item.description:
2hr Damaged/tripped kerb Chipped dropped kerb. Please fill with concrete 300x200x60mm Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 31st March
item.description:
Damaged bollard Bollard does not hold correct position and twists so keep left signage does not show. Please can bollard be fixed to hold position or be replaced. Road closure (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 300mmx300mmx43mm TM: temporary road closure Outside 2 Cursey Cottage (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 31st March
item.description:
15DB CW: Edge deteration (Patch Required). 2200mmx400mmx69mm TM: temporary lane closure Next to Green Cabinet (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 300mmx500mmx58mm TM: temporary road closure Outside 2 Cursey Cottage (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 1000mmx1700mmx52mm TM: temporary road closure W3w airfields.perch.whimpered (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 500mmx400mmx70mm TM: temporary lane closure Next to Green Cabinet (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Pothole 500mmx1100mmx51mm TM: Give and Take Outside 2 Cursey Cottage (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cheltenham sign pointing opposite direction to Town, 31st March
item.description:
The sign on the 2nd exit of the GE roundabout, heading away from Cheltenham, has Cheltenham 5 miles on it. No further signs in this direction to Cheltenham, although local knowledge- you can get to Cheltenham via Stoke Road. I would suggest this sign is mis leading.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 900mmx2300mmx56mm TM: temporary road closure Outside No 2 Church View (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes on Athelney Way, 31st March
item.description:
There are a number of large potholes on Athelney Way close to the junction with Hales Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athelney Way, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
Email received 30/03/2026 - copy attached along with photos. Customer reports that a tree at the location is leaning more and more each week. Crown of the tree has dropped 2-3 foot due to the lean and you can see cracking on the trunk. Concerned it is going to collapse.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 31st March
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab Please lift and relay 450x220x20mm Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW. On crossing point 300x300x50mm Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
tree dropping large branches onto pavement and property
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Rutting and Depression 1200mmx310mmx53mm TM: STOP and GO Near lamp post No 35 (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken kerb, a danger to pedestrians, 31st March
item.description:
At the corner of st Phillips street the curb is badly damaged and dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Norwood Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes along previous roadworks, 31st March
item.description:
As you drive up Norwood road and enter the junction of Suffolk street the surface is awful, its now a line of potholes due to the poor work on a previous trench in the road. I cycle this route daily and it's dangerous. this is a higlhy used piece of road and its getting worse by the week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Norwood Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
